name: Webex
description: Sync Cisco Webex rooms, meetings, messages, and people into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Your Webex OAuth App Client ID
install_fields.help: From developer.webex.com → Your App → Credentials → Client ID

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Your Webex OAuth App Client Secret
install_fields.help: From developer.webex.com → Your App → Credentials → Client Secret

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Optional. The OAuth redirect URI registered in your Webex App.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate client_id and client_secret. If an access_token is already configured, probe GET /people/me.

methods.name: Authorize
methods.description: Return the Webex OAuth2 authorization URL with required scopes.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /people/me and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE. Updates the circuit breaker.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Webex rooms and meetings into the knowledge base.

methods.name: Get Room
methods.description: Retrieve a single room by ID.

methods.name: List People
methods.description: Paginated list of people in the organization.

apis.name: Install / Authenticate
apis.description: Validate client_id and client_secret are present.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: Return the Webex OAuth2 authorization URL.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Ping GET /people/me and return current health.

apis.name: Sync Records
apis.description: Sync Webex rooms and meetings into the knowledge base.
